title: NPRB Releases Four-Part Arctic Film Series
summary: The North Pacific Research Board (NPRB) has released a four-part film series highlighting the Arctic Integrated Ecosystem Research Program (IERP). The series features the cultural and scientific importance of studying the Arctic, the science methods and results, how coastal communities were involved...

title: Seeking Nominations for Advisory Panel for Gulf of Alaska and At-Large Seats
summary: The North Pacific Research Board seeks applications to fill three seats on its Advisory Panel. Two designated seats will represent the Gulf of Alaska Region and one designated seat will represent the North Pacific At-large. The deadline for receipt of nomination materials is Friday, March 31, 2023 ....
